reasoning: As of late October 2025, Polymarket odds imply an 8% chance for xAI to have the top model, with Google overwhelmingly favored at 77% (likely due to the expected release of Gemini 3.0) and OpenAI at 13%. While xAI's Grok-4 had strong performance upon its July 2025 release, the rapid pace of AI advancement leaves it highly vulnerable to being surpassed by competitors in the two months leading up to December 31. Additionally, the tiebreaker rules specifically disadvantage xAI against Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Therefore, aligning with market consensus is optimal.
batch_queries: Will xAI have the top AI model on December 31?
